decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

RUNNER FALSE-NEGATIVE: monitor returned 0/13 blank views (anonymous-curl anti-scrape) so threshold logic never fired. Pulled real stats from live voidline Studio session. NOTABLE: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, question hook, pub 06-15) = 320v -> new #1 Short, broke the ~300 plateau (>50v delta from 0 baseline). Traffic 95.9% Shorts Feed = pure organic, NOT suppressed. Total Shorts ~1237v (was 861v on 06-07). First pulse in 16 days (last real 06-13 14:02).

State drift: v1_bonus_briggs auto-published 06-15 but stayed SCHEDULED for 14 days. Verified PUBLIC (oEmbed 200 + Studio 'Publiee', 320v). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Also spotted new untracked DRAFT in Studio: '9 Barrels Empty. The Mary Celeste Vapor Theory' (Brouillon, not in state).

Pulse alerter is structurally blind in cloud: monitor_voidline.py anonymous curl = 0% stat coverage. Every pulse false-negatives until monitor is ported to fetch via authenticated camoufox-stealth voidline session (proven this run: one extract_text returns all stats). TODO from 06-13 now confirmed fully broken; #1 infra fix.
